locations.title: Locations
leads.title: Leads
face.title: Facial Biometrics
face.modelsError: Failed to load facial recognition models.
face.cameraError: Could not access camera. Check permissions.
face.noFaceDetected: No face detected. Center your face and try again.
report.title: Detection Report
report.selectDates: Select a date range to view detections.
report.visitorNote: Contact info hidden — visitor from another location
settings.title: Settings
settings.sensitivityHelp: Controls how strict the facial matching algorithm is. Lower values accept more approximate matches; higher values require closer similarity.
home.subtitle: Transform data into relational and spiritual care through an intelligent facial recognition system — a channel for communication, care, and pastoral follow-up.
home.heroVerse: 'Shepherd the flock of God that is under your care. Watch over them — not because you must, but because you are willing, as God wants you to be.'
home.thesisLeft: Use Technology to better Shepherd people
home.thesisRight: Deliver an impactful experience to visitors
home.problemQuote: Churches are growing, but leaders are losing visibility over who arrives, who drifts away, and how to care for each person individually.
home.problem1: No data on attendance and engagement
home.solutionSubtitle: Phase 1 — System Architecture for Pastors & Leaders
home.sol2: Leadership dashboard with metrics and reports
home.howMemberDesc: Generates attendance report and contact action plan
home.howVisitorDesc: Routes to welcome and integration team
home.benefit1Desc: Know who's present, who's been away, and act with intentionality.
home.benefit2Desc: Information and data available for follow-up and leadership decisions.
home.benefit3Desc: Identify first-time visitors instantly and route them to your integration team.
home.benefit4Desc: Centralize and personalize outreach with context and care.
home.cloudDesc: No local servers needed. Batch processing for lower costs. Scalable for churches of all sizes. Full LGPD compliance.
home.feature1Desc: Advanced AI-powered face detection and matching with state-of-the-art embeddings.
home.feature2Desc: Track detections across all your locations with detailed analytics and filtering.
home.feature3Desc: Secure biometric data handling with consent-based registration and encrypted storage.
home.formError: Please fill in all required fields.
home.verificationSent: A verification message has been sent to confirm the update.
home.footerTagline: Using technology to shepherd people with care and purpose.
